title: Verify Session Authorization
objective: Validates that all API endpoints that modify campaign data are protected and require a valid, authenticated session.

steps.step: As an unauthenticated user (e.g., in an incognito browser window), attempt to make a direct API call to a campaign-modifying endpoint, such as POST /campaigns/{id}/ticks.
steps.expected_result: The API call is rejected with an authentication error (e.g., HTTP 401 Unauthorized).

steps.step: Log in as a standard 'GM' user to obtain a valid session token.
Using the obtained session token, repeat the API call to POST /campaigns/{id}/ticks with a valid payload.
steps.expected_result: The API call is accepted, and the new Tick is created in the campaign.

steps.step: Log out to invalidate the session token.
Using the now-invalidated session token, attempt the same POST /campaigns/{id}/ticks API call again.
steps.expected_result: The API call is rejected with an authentication error (e.g., HTTP 401 Unauthorized).
